title: Restore missing Spider-Verse comic panel images

requirements.text: Render the 13 regenerated Spider-Verse comic panel images (spiderverse-panel-07 through spiderverse-panel-19, excluding panel 20) as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
acceptanceCriteria: All 13 panel images are available in frontend/public/assets/generated
Images are referenced correctly in the comic data structure
Comic viewer displays all panels without missing image warnings for these specific panels

constraints: Do not modify the backend schema or main.mo
Do not edit immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, useActor.ts, main.tsx, or components/ui
nonGoals: Creating new comic panels beyond the 13 specified
Modifying the comic data structure or narrative content
Altering the narration or speech recognition features

required: Spider-Verse comic panel 7 with cinematic action scene, halftone dots, bold inking, dynamic composition (spiderverse-panel-07.dim_1024x768.png)
